# Vendored third-party assets

`chart.umd.min.js` — Chart.js v4.4.1 (UMD build), MIT License, (c) Chart.js Contributors.
Sourced from the official npm package `chart.js@4.4.1` (dist/chart.umd.js) and vendored here
to remove the runtime dependency on a third-party CDN. To update: `npm pack chart.js@<ver>`,
copy `package/dist/chart.umd.js` over this file, and bump the version note.
